extDesc.message: Smart text assistant powered by Mistral AI

optionsIntro.message: Configure API access, writing style and appearance.

customCommandsIntro.message: Create your own actions. They will appear in the LexiSync selection menu.

glossaryHint.message: Use one “source term = translation” pair per line. The glossary stays on this device.

styleProfilesIntro.message: Create instructions for work email, chats, or publications.

portableSettingsHint.message: The API key, history, statistics, and local language model are never included.

historyEmpty.message: History is empty. Successful results will appear here.

confirmClearHistory.message: Delete the entire request history? This cannot be undone.

commandNotFound.message: The original custom command was not found.

toggleApiKey.message: Show or hide the API key

appearanceHint.message: Scale applies to the selection toolbar, AI menu, and result window.

sendContextHint.message: When enabled, up to 2,000 surrounding characters, the page title, and domain are sent with the selection. Disabled by default.

suggestionsHint.message: LexiSync shows up to three options near the field. Use arrows to navigate, Tab or Enter to accept, and Esc to close.

learningHint.message: Words and phrases stay on this device. Passwords, payment fields, private windows, and excluded sites are ignored.

historyPrivateHint.message: History and cache are always disabled in private windows.

dictionaryLabel.message: Words that should not be corrected:

getApiKeyTitle.message: Where do I get an API key?

getApiKeyStep2.message: Find API Keys in the left menu.

getApiKeyStep3.message: Select Create new key and copy it.

onboardingIntro.message: The extension corrects, translates, and improves text directly on the page.

onboardingShortcutsHint.message: Core actions work without opening a menu.

onboardingPrivacyHint.message: LexiSync can learn frequently used words locally and suggest continuations with Tab.

onboardingApiHint.message: Mistral is needed only for AI processing. Local suggestions and keyboard layout correction work without it.

profileInstructionPlaceholder.message: Write concisely and professionally without corporate jargon.

commandPromptPlaceholder.message: Shorten the text while preserving key facts and meaning.

privacyOptIn.message: Only you can enable this feature

privacySensitive.message: Passwords and payment fields are ignored

privacyClear.message: You can clear the language profile at any time

apiStepPaste.message: Paste it on the General tab

apiStepIndependent.message: Other settings are saved independently of the key

presetShortPrompt.message: Shorten the text while preserving key facts and meaning.

presetSimplePrompt.message: Explain the text in clear, simple language without professional jargon.

presetListPrompt.message: Turn the text into a concise, structured bulleted list.

presetClientPrompt.message: Write a polite, professional, and specific client reply based on the text.

commandLimit.message: You can create up to 8 commands.

invalidKey.message: Settings were saved, but the new API key failed validation.

keyCheckUnavailable.message: Settings were saved. The API key could not be checked right now.

clearAdaptiveConfirm.message: Delete all locally learned words and phrases?

historyPromptSpellcheck.message: Correct spelling, grammar, and punctuation while preserving the wording.

historyPromptStyle.message: Rewrite the text in the style of this example result:

historyPromptEmoji.message: Add relevant emoji without overloading the text.

historyPromptLayout.message: Correct text typed with the wrong keyboard layout.

historyPromptTranslate.message: Translate the text while preserving meaning, terminology, and formatting.

historyPromptOcr.message: Turn the recognized text into a clean, readable form.

historyPromptCustom.message: Process the text by analogy with this result:

textNotFound.message: No text found. In Google Docs, select text, press Ctrl+C, and try the shortcut again.

clipboardDenied.message: Clipboard access was denied. Click the document and try again.

clipboardReadFailed.message: Could not read the clipboard. Allow access and try again.

dictionaryFuture.message: Do not correct this word in the future

offlineError.message: You appear to be offline. Check your connection and try again.

textTooLong.message: The text is too long. Select no more than 3,000 characters at a time.

refineLongPrompt.message: Expand the text with useful explanations while staying concise.

refineFormalPrompt.message: Rewrite the text in a more formal and professional style.

selectOcrArea.message: Select a screen area for text recognition

requestFailed.message: The request could not be completed.

invalidApiKey.message: Invalid API key. Check your settings.

mistralRateLimit.message: The Mistral rate limit was exceeded. Try again shortly.

mistralUnavailable.message: Mistral is temporarily unavailable. Try again.

imageMissing.message: No image was received for recognition.

ocrNoText.message: Mistral OCR found no text in the selected area.

emptyStream.message: Mistral returned an empty response stream.

requestTimeout.message: The request timed out after 45 seconds.

settingsFileTooLarge.message: The settings file is too large.

unsupportedSettingsFormat.message: This settings file format is not supported.
